component.name: Moonshine
component.summary: Game streaming server for Moonlight clients

description.p: Moonshine lets you stream games from your PC to any device running the Moonlight client. Your keyboard, mouse, and controller inputs are sent back to the host so you can play games remotely as if you were sitting in front of it.

ul.li: Isolated streaming sessions: Each stream runs in its own compositor, completely separate from your desktop
No monitor required: Works on headless servers without HDMI dummy plugs
Hardware video encoding: H.264, H.265, and AV1 encoding using the GPU
HDR support: True 10-bit HDR streaming for supported games
Full input support: Mouse, keyboard, and gamepad including motion, touchpad, and haptics
Audio streaming: Stereo and surround sound with low-latency Opus encoding
